parameters.content:
## Daily Portfolio P&L Digest

Sends a morning summary of your Polymarket wallet positions and profit/loss.

**Setup:**
1. Enter your Polymarket wallet address in the "Get Wallet Positions" node
2. Configure Telegram (or swap for Slack/Email) credentials
3. Adjust the schedule time (default: 9am daily)

**How it works:**
- Fetches all open positions for your wallet at 9am
- Calculates total portfolio value, per-position P&L, and identifies top gainers/losers
- Formats a clean digest and sends it to Telegram

**Note:** There is no dedicated wallet value endpoint, so total value is computed from position data.
